extension.description: Orion v3.6.0 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. Landscape horizontal thumbnails, no name banners, cyan (#00D4FF) color scheme. Netflix-style search with fullscreen grid results. Master skin toggle in Settings to switch between Netflix skin and classic list view. Season selector and episode grid. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration.
extension.news: [3.6.0] Landscape horizontal posters throughout all views, name banners removed, full cyan theme, Netflix-style search with grid results, master skin on/off toggle in Settings. [3.5.6] Previous iteration.
